procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1074.001
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1074.001 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

runs.stdout:
PathToAtomicsFolder = /opt/atomic-red-team/atomics

Executing test: T1074.001-2 Stage data from Discovery.sh
Exit code: 0
Done executing test: T1074.001-2 Stage data from Discovery.sh

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1074.001 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 2 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1074.001'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1074.001 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 2

sigma.title: Zip A Folder With PowerShell For Staging In Temp - PowerShell
Zip A Folder With PowerShell For Staging In Temp  - PowerShell Module
Zip A Folder With PowerShell For Staging In Temp - PowerShell Script
Folder Compress To Potentially Suspicious Output Via Compress-Archive Cmdlet
Google Full Network Traffic Packet Capture

osquery.name: t1074_001_file_access
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 6/6 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
